## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Content update (new or updated translation)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have added/updated tests as needed
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My code follows the existing style conventions
- [ ] If adding content: translations are included for all supported languages
- [ ] If adding content: new terms are added to GLOSSARY.md
- [ ] Translation validation passes (`npx ts-node scripts/validate-translations.ts`)
